paper_title: Effect of Pollen Source and Cultivars on Quality Characteristics of Date Palm

methods.description: The study was conducted to evaluate the effect of pollen source and cultivars on the quality characteristics of date palm using a Randomized Block Design with three replications.

steps.description: The experiment was laid out on more than 30 years old plant in Randomized Block Design with three replications.
steps.searchable_summary: set up experiment using Randomized Block Design with three replications

steps.description: Data was collected on bio chemical parameters.
steps.searchable_summary: collect data on biochemical parameters of date palm

methods.description: Measurement of total soluble solids in date palm juice using an Erma hand refractometer.

steps.description: The total soluble solids were recorded with Erma hand refractometer (0-32 °Brix and 32-60 °Brix) by putting a drop of juice and recorded the reading.
steps.searchable_summary: measure total soluble solids using Erma hand refractometer

steps.description: The refractometer was calibrated with distilled water with every use and the values were expressed in °Brix soluble solids.

methods.description: Estimation of titratable acidity in date palm using the method suggested by A.O.A.C. (1980).

steps.description: The method suggested by A.O.A.C. (1980) was followed for estimation of titratable acidity.
steps.searchable_summary: estimate titratable acidity using A.O.A.C. method

methods.method_name: Estimation of Total and Reducing Sugars
methods.description: Estimation of total and reducing sugars in date palm using the method described by Hulme and Narain (1993).

steps.description: The total and reducing sugars were estimated as per the method described by Hulme and Narain (1993).
steps.searchable_summary: estimate total and reducing sugars using Hulme and Narain method

methods.description: Statistical analysis of the collected data using analysis of variance and OPSTAT statistical software.

steps.description: Statistical analysis of data collected during the study was done by applying the technique of analysis of variance (Rai and Grover, 2006).
steps.searchable_summary: perform analysis of variance on collected data

steps.description: All the statistical analysis was carried out by using OPSTAT statistical software.
steps.searchable_summary: use OPSTAT software for statistical analysis
